headline: P&L exposure: ₹45 Cr direct operational cost; no speculative or precedent risk identified.
what_matters: No supply chain transmission: event is direct operational risk at Adani Power's own plants, not cascading to suppliers.
P/E compression of 0.05-0.1x possible if risk persists; immediate margin erosion of 10 bps; ₹45 Cr revenue at risk from operational disruption.
Potential cost of capital increase by 20-40 bps if SEBI or investors penalize weak BRSR/TCFD disclosure; FII outflows possible if TCFD/CDP scores drop.
action: Quantify exposure: ₹45 Cr direct operational cost; no speculative or precedent risk identified.
